    com.mot.rfid.api3  

    • Uses of TagAccess.AuthenticateAccessParams in com.mot.rfid.api3

      Fields in com.mot.rfid.api3 declared as TagAccess.AuthenticateAccessParams 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      TagAccess.AuthenticateAccessParams TagAccess.Sequence.Operation.AuthenticateAccessParams
      valid if AccessOperationCode is ACCESS_OPERATION_AUTHENTICATE
      Methods in com.mot.rfid.api3 with parameters of type TagAccess.AuthenticateAccessParams 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void TagAccess.AuthenticateEvent​(TagAccess.AuthenticateAccessParams authenticateAccessParams, AccessFilter accessFilter, AntennaInfo antennaInfo)
      This method is used to read memory bank data from tags that match the AccessFilter criteria if specified.
      TagData TagAccess.AuthenticateWait​(java.lang.String tagID, TagAccess.AuthenticateAccessParams authenticateAccessParams, AntennaInfo antennaInfo)
      This method is used to read memory bank data from a specific tag.
